case_title: MACADAM COMPUTER INC. RESPONDENT VS. ALEXANDRA LAKE APPELLANT

docket_entries.description: RECORD ON APPEAL JUDGEMENT FILED BY APPELLANT LAKE, ALEXANDRA AS TO RESPONDENT MACADAM COMPUTER INC. HEARING SET FOR OCT-06-2004 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 525 SMALL CLAIMS CASE NUMBER 795047
EX PARTE APPLICATION TO CONTINUE APPEAL DATE & DECL OF MARTIN D. MURPHY IN SUPP THEREOF
MINUTES FOR OCT-06-2004 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 525

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF OCT-06-2004 - JUDGMENT IS ORDERED FOR RESPONDENT/PLAINTIFF MACADAM COMPUTER, INC. AND AGAINST APPELLANT/DEFENDANT ALEXANDRA LAKE. DENIAL OF MOTION TO VACATE AFFIRMED. MOTION TO VACATE DENIED. DEFENDANT ALEXANDRA LAKE TO PAY $750.00 TO RESPONDENT/PLAINTIFF PER CCP 116.790(A); SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT. JUDGE: PRO TEM JUDGE RICHARD A. HORNING; REPORTER: NOT REPORTED; CLERK: MARJORIE MANZELLA (D-525, WED., 06-OCT-04).
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF HEARING ON APPEAL
STIPULATION AND ORDER TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT MACADAM COMPUTER INC. RECOVER FROM APPELLANT LAKE, ALEXANDRA $750.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $750.00, SEE SCANNED DOC
